name: Cumin Kidney Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 1 large onion and sauté in water until soft.
2. Add the cumin seeds to the onions and cook for 1-2 minutes.
3. Stir in the canned tomatoes and black pepper, then simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and add the kidney beans. Serve over rice.
